summary: The diff implements all seven requirements from the build request. All sections (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact) are present with correct content, the sticky navigation with smooth-scroll and dark mode toggle is implemented, and the design system uses Inter font, monochromatic palette with one accent color, and subtle hover effects. One minor concern: the desktop navigation links array in Navigation.tsx omits 'Hero' as a named link (though a logo/name link to #hero exists). Additionally, InternetIdentityProvider and useActor hook are included as infrastructure even though authentication/backend features were explicitly listed as non-goals.

missing_requirements.requirement: Navigation bar contains links to all five sections (Hero, About, Skills, Projects, Contact)
missing_requirements.reason: The navLinks array in Navigation.tsx only includes About, Skills, Projects, and Contact. There is no explicit named 'Hero' nav link; only the logo ('YN.') scrolls to #hero, which may not satisfy the AC requiring a named link to the Hero section.

hallucinated_features.description: InternetIdentityProvider and Internet Identity authentication infrastructure included in the app
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly lists 'Authentication or user accounts' as a non-goal. main.tsx wraps App in InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity.ts plus useActor.ts implement a full authentication flow that was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A Footer component with caffeine.ai attribution link was added
hallucinated_features.reason: No footer component was requested in the build request. It is an unrequested feature added beyond the specified sections.

hallucinated_features.description: 'Available for work' status badge in the Hero section
hallucinated_features.reason: The Hero section requirements specify only a name placeholder, 'Developer' tagline, and a brief one-liner intro. An 'Available for work' badge was not requested.
